About.heading: The premium furniture destination in Vietnam
About.leftHeading: At nanoHome, we believe in "living beautifully every day" — from ordinary moments to special occasions.
About.p1: As the official distributor of iconic brands such as Cassina, Maxalto, Knoll, B&B Italia, Fritz Hansen, Vitra, USM and Flos, nanoHome offers a comprehensive product ecosystem for the living room, bedroom, kitchen-dining and workspace. We accompany you from aesthetic advice, layout solutions to dedicated after-sales care, so every choice is truly "right" for you.
About.p2: Visit a nanoHome showroom to experience the latest collections and find inspiration for your home.

Rooms.heading: Products by room
Rooms.desc1: Soft curves combined with luxurious materials create a space that is both modern and cozy.
Rooms.desc2: Refined design creates artistic dining moments.
Rooms.desc3: Natural materials and gentle forms bring restful sleep and a calm spirit.
Rooms.desc4: Durable furniture, open design, seamless connection between indoors and out.
